sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Aircraft Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Fighting Thunder aircraft in vertically scrolling shooter gameplay. Aircraft maneuvers to avoid enemy attacks and engage enemies.

special_mechanics.name: Cooperative Projectile System
special_mechanics.description: In cooperative play, both players can generate special projectiles that damage enemies by shooting the other player craft.

special_mechanics.name: Shrapnel Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: When the player dies, the fighter's shrapnel becomes projectiles that damage enemies.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. Raiden Trad is a shoot-em-up with no documented jump physics, gravity systems, or sub-pixel mechanics. No precise movement parameters available in source material.
